Sacrifice  

Description

1: Sacrifice

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 100 Skill: Alteration
Casting Time: 5 Recast Time: 1.5
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 100
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Deletable: No Blockable: Yes
Focusable: Yes Dispellable: Yes
Interruptable: Yes Target Type: Single Party Member
Spell Type: Beneficial Source: Live 12/03

Game Description

Consumes a willing target's soul and binds it within an essence emerald. Players killed in this manner cannot be resurrected. Consumes an emerald when cast.

Reagents

  • Emerald x 1

Items with this effect

  • Spell: Sacrifice

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Sacrifice
ClassLevel
NEC51
Expansion:

Duration:
Instant
  • Comments (56)
  • Sold By (1)
  • Dropped By (8)
  • Quested (2)
  • Crafted (1)
  • Screenshots
  • Spell: Sacrifice - Research 131
  • Necromancer Spells
  • Necromancer Spells (Cabilis)

Some info

# Apr 27 2024 at 9:56 PM Rating: Decent
Hullan
244 posts
Level 62 Necro sac'd a lvl 101 (level 100 heroic boost) character until it hit level 100 and then is said the toon wasn't a worthy sacrifice. I guess they have built in protections to stop the never ending EE production from one of them. Only problem was when I used the boost the XP wasn't even 25% into 100 and now its at 97%. So much xp for EEs being withheld...

WHAT THE POINT
QuoteReply
# Apr 20 2005 at 1:02 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591825475840
2 posts
whats the point of this spell are EE stones used for something, i'm lost.
▲ Page top
RE: WHAT THE POINT
QuoteReply
# Jun 15 2005 at 8:36 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1679271392283
Scholar
308 posts
Essence Emeralds are used for the Necromancer ressurection spell 'Convergence'. There's also another spell that uses an Essence Emerald, some sort of teleport or something like that, but I haven't gotten too far into the high level spells.

▲ Page top
RE: WHATS THE POINT
QuoteReply
# Jul 29 2007 at 7:56 PM Rating: Decent
darkforceb
Scholar
47 posts
The point in having EE's is it gives the necromancer a rez spell if he is the only one who survives in a raid by using FD then he can rez a cleric, it is also used for the spell Trucidation which siphons 1500 points from Target and restores it to you, life tap spell. each cast costs one EE so then bottom line is they are expensive 250 - 300 plat each so its like throwing plat away, or if you are lucky enough to have two EQ accounts where you can join your level 45 sacrifice dude to your party and cast on him all day, but it still cost 15 plat per emerald at a vendor , and there is a chance of failure hence wasting you EE, if you have the Sacrifice spell.
▲ Page top
RE: WHAT THE POINT
QuoteReply
# Jan 08 2006 at 2:16 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592269919177
Scholar
33 posts
not for a teleport spell... what you're probably thinking of is a spell infusion -- gives 1k mana to caster. A waste really, considering that 1k mana isnt too much, and that these are a ***** to attain

▲ Page top
Essence Emeralds
QuoteReply
# Jan 19 2005 at 12:47 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595175356756
View User Forum
9 posts
Theoretically How many emeralds could you get sac'ing a 65 back to 46. Just wondering as I have a friend who is leaving the game and would like to sell them after as I have plenty of these.
▲ Page top
Essence Emeralds
QuoteReply
# Oct 08 2010 at 10:08 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1609719425741
Scholar
263 posts
On Al'kabor you can only sacrifice level 60 toons to 46th.

It took me 77 deaths to go from all but dinging 66th to 60th. (The exp bar was capped. We're capped at 65th on Al'kabor) I then sacrificed myself 138 times to reach level 45. We then started to rez the 77 corpses, but 20 rez timers ran out. Even then, I re-dinged back to level 58.6. I suspect that had all 77 corpses had been rezzed, that I would have re-dinged to about level 60.

So, my guess is that if you had a level 65.96 toon like I had, if all you wanted were EEs, then I guess you could be sacrificed about 270 to 280 times (including rezzing the 77 corpses).
▲ Page top
Essence Emeralds
QuoteReply
# Aug 29 2006 at 3:15 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1594571424652
4 posts
Recently sac'd an alt from high 61 down to low 59 (ranger needs to keep EQ) and got 32 EEs.

RE: level 65's
QuoteReply
# Dec 03 2004 at 11:32 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250059997
136 posts
marketing reason. so you need to have and get people to play the game to be within that level range. if everyone is 65+ then you cant make more. so you have to get more people to play..

# Aug 30 2004 at 7:14 AM Rating: Decent

24 posts
Currently if it's used on a level 65 there is nothing to "lose." The target would already be at their max level with nothing to gain.

RE: EEs?
QuoteReply
# Jun 15 2005 at 8:41 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1679271392283
Scholar
308 posts
Yes. One for each Essence Emerald you wish to create. You also only get one for each sacrifice.

AA's
QuoteReply
# May 05 2004 at 9:54 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591779990252
29 posts
if you get sacrificed down below lv 51 do you lose all AA's that you worked so hard to get?
if not can there actualy be a lv 45 baron???
▲ Page top
RE: AA's
QuoteReply
# Jun 26 2004 at 4:17 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591773994568
Guru
658 posts
Any activated AAs (the ones you have to click a hotbutton for, like MGB, Dire Charm, etc) aren't usable any more, but innate AAs (Run Speed, Spell Casting Mastery, Natural Durability) still work, and you retain the title. I know someone on Vazaelle who became a level 23 Beastlord with an "Elder" title.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: May 20 2004 at 7:50 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) No...lvl51 is minimum lvl for doing AAs
Can anyone use these?
QuoteReply
# Mar 30 2004 at 4:21 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1660522686317
Scholar
166 posts
I have a character that I am thinking of sacrificing for the emeralds for a "just incase" rezz for the characters I play with regularly. My question is can anyone use the emerald or do you have to give it to a necro in order to be rezzed? If that is the case, do they sell decently in the bazaar becasue I will end up with 18 of them. Any info will be appreciated, thanks.
▲ Page top
RE: Can anyone use these?
QuoteReply
# Aug 28 2004 at 3:32 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593966266483
51 posts
The essence emerald is a reagent for a few spells. So to answer your question, you have to give it to a necro for the rez(aka convergence).
▲ Page top
whats it do?
QuoteReply
# Feb 23 2004 at 9:52 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592261732470
2 posts
sooo... how does this spell work? And whats this "essence emerald" thing... im very confused =P pls give any info on this spell if you can. thx =)
▲ Page top
RE: whats it do?
QuoteReply
# Mar 26 2004 at 3:38 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591802937666
30 posts
This spell sacrafices (kills) another player, and gives you an Essence Emerald. You have to be groupped with them, and they have to click "ok" on a dialog box. You can only sacrafice people of level 46+, so you can't just start a new lvl 1 character, and sacrafice it. :)

Once they click "ok", they die instantly. It costs roughly same exp as a fall, and they cannot be resurrected by anyone.

The essence emerald is needed for the lvl 53 spell Convergence (93% rez).

Edited, Fri Mar 26 15:38:36 2004
▲ Page top
RE: whats it do?
QuoteReply
# Oct 09 2004 at 8:47 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1652660341379
758 posts
Thanks for that info ... I had been wondering if you could rez someone and keep doing this until they were below 46 .

That would have been too good to be true
▲ Page top
Raid Saver
QuoteReply
# Feb 13 2004 at 4:09 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591787209363
Scholar
243 posts
These gems are a raid life saver. Say your in one of thoughs hard to break zones like fear. Everyone zones in CLR's Tank's Ench's and Necro's. All the sudden someone gets feared and mistakenly runs back to your camp training everything. Necro FD's and your hole party is wiped luckly your necro has 1 of these stones on him/her thats one CLR back in the zone rdy to rez(after rez fades and necro pump em for a bit) more CLR or tanks's and then everyone else gem free. This spell was not made to be a money maker but if you do want one gem to rez your CLR on a raid that option is there. My sugesion would be to get one gem on you pay someone for the sacrifice or use and alt if your 2 boxxing or if the raid is that important sacrifice a willing party in your raid for the larger good. (CLR's with thank you) hope this help : )
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Feb 09 2004 at 2:02 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) This is the most stupid item to get, for a necro...Why not be able to get off corpses and not have anyone loose XP. Necro rez items are the only glitch item in the game that needs to sacrifice PC's to get an item...wth? Why are we screwed like this?
OMG
QuoteReply
# Feb 04 2004 at 11:38 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591752854338
7 posts
Ok get this...I was sac'ing someone who was quitting EQ...a Guide came and told me to quit so I did...a warning went on my account for disrupting a zone OMFG why have this friggin spell if it only causes you trouble?
▲ Page top
RE: OMG
QuoteReply
# Nov 05 2004 at 8:57 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591758892776
